results.title: E2E: Full Flow with Variation Section — Select, Add to Cart, Place Order
results.notes: BLOCKED — precondition not met: no Product-type sections with seeded variation options found on any test configurable product. Bike with options (f16d3e8f) has Variation-type section with 0 options. Configurable Hat has Product-type sections with hat color options (Black/Beige/Green/Red) but no variation product links (no size/color variants of same SKU). Full E2E flow with variation selection cannot be executed without dedicated test data. Blocking issue: missing seeded variation options in Product-type sections.

results.title: E2E: Mixed Configuration — Product Section + Text Section + File Section
results.notes: BLOCKED — same precondition as CFG-VAR-019: mixed configuration E2E requires a product with an active Product-type section that has seeded options plus Text/File sections all in one configuration. Configurable Hat has this structure (Product+Product+Text+File) but the org account (Coffee shop / Elena Mutykova) has no ship-to address configured, so 'Add to Cart' button is absent and cart flow cannot proceed. Personal test account (qa-agent-slot2@virtocommerce.com) would be needed but session not available in this browser context.
